zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Craft於大約1170年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾維爾時，他的父親Roger de Craft16歲，母親Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter27歲。他於大約1207年與Cecily de Turville在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾瑟盧亞斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1236年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾派維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Craft
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever, learned’.
English: habitational name from Croft in Leicestershire. See also   Croft  .
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . See also   Croft  .

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

variants.name: Crafts
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of Craft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Crafter
meanings: English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English craft ‘skillful, clever’ in the sense ‘craftsman’. Compare Craft .

variants.name: Kraft
meanings: German (also Kräft), Danish, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a strong man, from Old High German kraft, German Kraft ‘strength, power’. The Swedish name probably originated as a soldier's name. In part, the German and Danish names possibly also derive from a late survival of the same word used as a byname, Old High German Chraft(o), Old Norse Kraptr. See also Craft and Croft .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Craft was born about 1170, in Willey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Craft, was 16 and his mother, Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter, was 27. He married Cecily de Turville about 1207, in Thurlaston, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1236, in Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Pipewell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Craft est né environ 1170, à Willey, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Craft, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Cecily de Turville environ 1207, à Thurlaston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1236, à Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Craft um 1170 in Willey, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Craft 16 und seine Mutter Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter 27. Er hat um 1207 in Thurlaston, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Cecily de Turville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1236 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pipewell, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Craft è nato il circa 1170 nel Willey, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Craft, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Cecily de Turville circa 1207, nel Thurlaston, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1236, nel Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Craftが約1170年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィリーで生まれた時，父Roger de Craftは16歳，母Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalterは27歳であった。約1207年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアスウルラストンでCecily de Turvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1236年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン トゥルヴィルで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアピペウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Craft(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 윌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Craft(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1207년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 스를라스턴에서 Cecily de Turville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1236년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 터르빌에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 파이p웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Craft nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Willey, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Craft, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecily de Turville aproximadamente 1207, em Thurlaston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1236, em Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Pipewell, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Craft родился около 1170 г. в местности уилли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Craft было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Pipewell FitzWalter, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecily de Turville около 1207 г. в местности турластон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1236 г. в местности вестон турвилл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности паипюелл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
